newsletter: TLDR: Bot traffic now exceeds human traffic at 57% of web requests, with AI agent traffic up 8,000% in 2025 -- WarmHub marketing metrics should track citation rates and AI share of voice, not just traditional SEO.

TLDR: Using AI vs being AI-first -- marketing teams becoming creative studios where humans own strategy and narrative while AI handles execution; differentiation comes from doing less and curating better signals.

TLDR: A developer built a Claude Code routine that runs nightly, scans Slack/email/calendar, drafts replies, and writes summaries back to GitHub -- a detailed working blueprint directly relevant to your AI automation work.
